name: invoice-currency-converter-pl
description: Browser extension to convert USD/EUR to PLN using NBP exchange rates

scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:chrome: vite build --outDir dist/chrome && mv dist/chrome/manifest.chrome.json dist/chrome/manifest.json && rm dist/chrome/manifest.firefox.json
scripts.build:firefox: vite build --outDir dist/firefox && mv dist/firefox/manifest.firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json && rm dist/firefox/manifest.chrome.json
scripts.archive: npm run archive:chrome && npm run archive:firefox
